title: All Of Create
description: All of CREATE mods in one place!
body:
# What is All Of Create?
**All Of Create** is a modpack that adds a new way of playing Minecraft!

It is a pack of many "Create" mod addons.

# What you can do with it?
With the new mechanics that **Create** mod adds you can build **Factories**, **Train Stations**, or even make a **nuclear warhead**.

-----------
**All Of Create** is a modpack perfect for a survival world that you can expand as long as you have ideas for it!

![promotionalbanner1fix](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/845bd900bc30a2989ed9a44336602d533adf677f_0.webp)

----------
# What it adds?
erm, actually... there is a list of things:
